fixes_applied: tests/test.sh: replaced SWE-rebench stub (vitest pass-rate fallback, 0.99 ceiling for ALL trials) with 5 behavioral F2P gates evaluated via Python over filesystem state

tests/test_manifest.yaml: replaced ad-hoc structural gates with 5 implementation-agnostic F2P gates summing to weight 1.00 (LOCALE_EXTNAME 0.30, LOCALE_PMTITLE 0.20, EXPORT_FOOTERS 0.25, PROMPT_TITLE_RUNTIME 0.15, TEST_UPDATED 0.10)
Removed dependence on log_parsers.py (vitest stub) — verifier now stands alone; vitest run is informational only, used solely to confirm MarkdownFormatter.test.ts itself passes after the rename

validation_results.validation_method: local Python harness over /tmp/gemini-voyager-{baseline,gold,altname,altfix} clones; matches the python block embedded in test.sh

notes: Original test.sh was the SWE-rebench scaffold stub (parses vitest output + matches FAIL_TO_PASS list, but FAIL_TO_PASS=[] so it falls through to overall pass rate). The repo has 570/573 vitest passes pre-edit, so EVERY trial scored 0.994764 regardless of whether the rename actually happened — a textbook degenerate ceiling. Canonical patch was located in worktree at .claude/worktrees/exciting-shaw-9e4099/data-pipeline/artifacts_swechat/canonical_patches/<sid>.json (5 ts/tsx files + 10 locale jsons + 1 test, 39 insertions / 39 deletions, all pure string-rename Gemini Voyager -> Voyager). New verifier evaluates the rename behaviorally over filesystem state: extName / pm_title locale messages, four export-service footer regions, two titleText.textContent assignments in the prompt manager, and the MarkdownFormatter test assertion. Implementation-agnostic — the user explicitly floated 'Gem Voyager' as an alternative, so any non-empty rename that drops 'Gemini Voyager' from user-facing text passes. The GitHub URL https://github.com/Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager is allowed to remain (the user said GitHub stays unchanged) — verifier strips URLs before checking. Internal-only strings (PDFPrintService.ts code comment line 307, formatter.ts console.error tag line 113) are intentionally NOT checked — the user's scope explicitly excluded internal debug logs and unrelated build scripts. p2p_failed hard-coded False; weighted-replace formula matches the standard CLAUDE.md tail.
